summary: School Detail Page Card-Based Visual Refactor Testing Complete. Verified structured card-based UI with coral/orange accent (#E65C2A). All card structures, color system, and functionality verified through code review and initial Playwright test.
critical_code_review_comments: COLOR CONSTANTS correctly defined: ACCENT='#E65C2A', ACCENT_TINT='rgba(230,92,42,0.08)', ACCENT_BORDER='rgba(230,92,42,0.15)'
NO GREEN colors (#1a8a80, text-green, bg-green) found in SchoolDetailPage.js - PASS
NO BROWN tones (#8B3F1F) found in SchoolDetailPage.js - PASS
Hero Card: bg-white border border-gray-200/80 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 - VERIFIED
Why This School: highlighted card with ACCENT_TINT background and ACCENT_BORDER - VERIFIED
Next Step: inline card with bg-white border rounded-xl, CTA uses ACCENT background - VERIFIED
Quick Snapshot: MetricCard component with bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl - VERIFIED
Metric cards show quality micro labels in ACCENT color (Accessible, Good, Strong support, etc.) - VERIFIED
Coaching Staff: card container with bg-white border rounded-2xl divide-y, hover:bg-gray-50/50 states - VERIFIED
Program Details: structured card with bg-white border rounded-2xl, grid layout - VERIFIED
Match Breakdown: card with ACCENT progress bars - VERIFIED
Opportunity & Risk: card with divided rows, ACCENT for high level indicators - VERIFIED
Match Ring uses ACCENT (#E65C2A) for stroke color - VERIFIED
Add to Pipeline button uses ACCENT as background when not on board - VERIFIED

All data preserved (tuition, acceptance, students, graduation, retention, student-faculty, SAT, ACT, GPA, annual cost, in-state tuition, median debt, median earnings, school type, scholarship) - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Detail Page card-based visual refactor complete. Apple + Stripe hybrid design with coral/orange accent #E65C2A. All sections wrapped in white cards with borders and rounded corners. Why This School uses coral tinted background. Metric cards in grid layout with quality micro labels. Coaching staff has hover states. Match ring and progress bars use coral accent. No green or brown colors in the page.
